description: Triggers when the user needs to implement, audit, or fix hreflang tags for international/multilingual SEO — language codes, return tags, x-default, sitemap implementation
should_trigger: Audit my hreflang implementation — Google Search Console is showing errors
How do I add hreflang tags for my Italian, English, and Czech Next.js site?
Generate an hreflang XML sitemap for my 200-page multilingual website
My hreflang is set to 'en-uk' — is that correct?
Check my international SEO — I have pages in English, French, and German
Why does Google ignore my hreflang tags? I think I'm missing return tags
Should I use HTML link tags or sitemap for hreflang on my 500-page site?
should_not_trigger: Set up next-intl for my multilingual Next.js app
Translate my website content to French
Add language switcher to my navigation
Create a sitemap.xml for my single-language site
